128.reason: [This premature return statement causes the program to exit before printing the DFS and BFS sequences after vertex deletion. The code that follows this line is unreachable.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 1.0 , reason:  [This premature return statement causes the program to exit before printing the DFS and BFS sequences after vertex deletion. The code that follows this line is unreachable.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 1.0 , reason:  [The program returns early here, skipping the second set of DFS and BFS traversals after vertex deletion. This causes missing output lines.]
